## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have followed the project's coding style (`gofmt` + `goimports`)
- [ ] I have updated the [CHANGELOG.md](../CHANGELOG.md) under "Unreleased"
- [ ] I have updated the [README.md](../README.md) and/or [docs/](../docs/) where relevant
- [ ] I have not included any secrets or private URLs
